nodes.title: Top Hiring Trends to Watch in 2026

body.processed:
The employment landscape continues to evolve rapidly. Here are the key trends shaping hiring and workforce strategy in 2026.

Key Trends

  • AI-augmented recruiting - Companies are using AI to screen resumes and predict candidate success, but human judgment remains critical for cultural fit
  • Skills-based hiring - More employers are dropping degree requirements in favor of demonstrated skills and certifications
  • Return-to-office negotiations - Hybrid work policies are becoming a key differentiator in talent attraction
  • Pay transparency - Salary range disclosure is now mandated in many states, changing compensation conversations
body.summary: The employment landscape continues to evolve rapidly. Here are the key trends shaping hiring and workforce strategy in 2026.Key TrendsAI-augmented recruiting - Companies are using AI to screen resumes

nodes.title: Resume Tips That Actually Get You Interviews

body.processed:
As recruiters who review thousands of resumes each month, here is what we know works - and what does not.

What Gets Attention

  • Quantified achievements ("Increased revenue by 35%" vs. "Managed sales")
  • Clean, scannable formatting with clear section headers
  • A strong summary statement tailored to the target role
  • Relevant keywords that match the job description

Common Mistakes

  • Generic objective statements
  • Listing responsibilities instead of accomplishments
  • Including every job you have ever had
  • Typos and formatting inconsistencies

Need help refining your resume? Our career advisors offer free resume reviews for all registered candidates.
body.summary: As recruiters who review thousands of resumes each month, here is what we know works - and what does not.What Gets AttentionQuantified achievements ("Increased revenue by 35%" vs. "Managed sales")Clea

image.alt: Person working on resume at desk

body.processed:
With the cost of replacing an employee averaging 1.5-2x their salary, retention is a strategic priority. Here are proven strategies from our client partners.

Effective Strategies

  • Competitive compensation reviews - Conduct market analysis every 6 months, not annually
  • Career development paths - Employees stay when they see a clear future
  • Manager training - People leave managers, not companies
  • Flexible work arrangements - Trust employees with how and where they work
  • Recognition programs - Regular, genuine recognition costs nothing but yields loyalty
body.summary: With the cost of replacing an employee averaging 1.5-2x their salary, retention is a strategic priority. Here are proven strategies from our client partners.Effective StrategiesCompetitive compensatio
